CONTRIBUTING.md.summary: Documents ocode contribution guidelines (setup, workflow, testing, submission) needed before contributing.

PLAN-files-tab-search.md.summary: Implementation plan for files tab content search, needed when developing this feature.

PLAN-listbox-component.md.summary: This plan documents a reusable ListBox component to standardize render/scroll/hit-test logic, preventing offset drift when building TUI list surfaces.

PLAN-mask-mode.md.summary: This plan documents implementing /mask mode and sensitive-content scanning; refer to it when reducing LLM calls or extending safety coverage.

SCROLLING_TEST_REPORT.md.summary: This report documents manual functional testing of scrolling features; needed for verifying scroll implementation.

SETUP.md.summary: SETUP.md documents the installation and configuration steps for first-time setup of ocode.

TEAM_ONBOARDING.md.summary: This team onboarding guide documents ocode's terminal AI coding assistant project structure for new developers.

TESTING.md.summary: Documents testing status, provider integrations, and known issues for developers to verify coverage.

docs/acp-zed-spec.md.summary: Documents the ACP mode spec for ocode's Zed integration, needed when rewriting the internal ACP protocol.

docs/plugins.md.summary: Describes ocode's plugin system with custom tools, commands, LLM instructions, and MCP servers; needed for developing and managing plugins.

docs/title-generation-analysis.md.summary: Analyzes session title generation, regex extraction, and Bubble Tea render cycle timing for debugging UI update delays.

docs/zed.md.summary: This file documents integrating ocode with Zed as an agent via ACP, needed for setup and configuration.

internal/tool/TODO_OCODE.md.summary: This TODO file documents pending tasks for developers to complete in the OCODE tool.

minimax-m*.OCODE.md.summary: This file documents coding style, git policy, and constraints for minimax-m* models, used when developing agent features or configuring these models.

opencode-update-summary.md.summary: This update summary documents OpenCode changes from v1.15.9 to v1.15.12 for developers reviewing features and fixes.
